must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Share Acquisition between Haneul Materials Co., Ltd. (Seorae Exchange Main Board; code HM-0000) and Jadong Robotics Co., Ltd.

Structure: Haneul Materials intends to acquire approximately 51% of Jadong Robotics via a combination of secondary share purchase and new issuance; consideration mix (cash/equity) to be finalized and publicly confirmed upon execution of the SPA.

Valuation and price mechanics: Reference valuation methodology (EV/EBITDA and peer multiples) has been described in the public investor presentation dated 2025-02-12; final price adjustment for working capital to be determined at closing and then re-announced via the public portal.

Timeline: Target signing is after market close on or after 2025-03-20, with closing expected within 90 days subject to satisfaction of conditions; any delays and revised dates will be updated via the public portal and issuer IR notices.

Financing: Cash consideration to be sourced from available cash and a committed revolving facility from Baegun Commercial Bank, Ltd. (facility summary already posted in a 2024-11-30 financing update), with no new security issuance by the issuer anticipated at signing.

Financing: Cash consideration to be sourced from available cash and a committed revolving facility from Baegun Commercial Bank, Ltd. (facility summary already posted in a 2024-11-30 financing update), with no new security issuance by the issuer anticipated at signing.

Employee/operational updates: Jadong Robotics completed a plant consolidation in 2023 (publicly reported) with no further changes planned before closing; no issuer operational updates are announced in connection with this term sheet.
